Name: Blue Collar Songs
Description: No drive by truckers and probably, by extension, leave Amanda Shires ex husband out of it. IDK ask Neil though.

Name: Hey, Soul Sister
Description: My heart is bound to beat right out my untrimmed chest. So gangsta I'm so thug. Like a virgin you're Madonna. It's hard to pick the worst line in that song. Anyway no Aretha, Etta or Simone.

Description: Psychedelic songs to enhance a specific type of vibe (magic shows of course)

Description: Excellent songs that came out at least 20 years after a bands debut album

Name: Wedding and a funeral
Description: One track each that should be played at your wedding and funeral.
